description: Recommended Fabric Real-Time Intelligence flow for the synthetic PI-style telemetry replay.

fabricComponents.role: Ingest replayed telemetry events and route to hot and cold paths.
fabricComponents.input: Synthetic PI Replay JSONL or local/websocket/API adapter

fabricComponents.role: Hot time-series store for live control room and PI Vision-style screens.
Persistent medallion storage for ontology, telemetry, event, KPI, and health tables.
Optional rules for live anomaly and action triggers.
exampleRules: If TAG-OPH-A-K101-VIB-PV > 5.0 mm/s for 10 minutes then raise Compressor Degradation watch event.
If TAG-ORC-B-C101-DP-PV > 78 kPa and EnergyIntensity is rising then raise CDU Constraint watch event.
If AssetHealthScore < 70 then create reliability review action.

fabricComponents.role: Direct Lake / Power BI model for KPI rollups, asset drilldown, and relationship-driven analytics.

demoModes.description: Use data/pi_telemetry_loop.csv as a six-hour loop for analytics and scenario playback.
Run replay script and route JSONL into Eventstream/Eventhouse with current timestamps.
React app reads curated dimension/KPI tables and subscribes to hot telemetry snapshot.
